name: Aggrescan3D
description: Predict aggregation propensity for each residue in a protein structure.
capabilities: Predict aggregation propensity for each residue in a protein structure

pdb_file.description: Protein structure file in PDB format for aggregation propensity analysis

dynamic_mode.description: Enable dynamic mode to account for protein flexibility via CABS-flex simulation

distance.description: Distance threshold in angstroms for aggregation patch detection

foldx.description: Enable FoldX stability filter to discard destabilizing mutations
